data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for informational UI notifications surfaced through framework-agnostic ui-core contracts. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for warning-tier UI notifications surfaced through framework-agnostic ui-core contracts. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for error-tier UI notifications surfaced through framework-agnostic ui-core contracts. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for critical-tier UI notifications — system-impacting incidents surfaced through ui-core contracts. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] In-flight save state shown on submit buttons exposed through ui-core action contracts. Present-progressive form; trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates work in progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Common dismiss action verb on UI buttons exposed through ui-core action contracts. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Common retry action verb on UI buttons after a failure, exposed through ui-core action contracts. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Default empty-state placeholder rendered by ui-core skeletons / spinners while data is being fetched. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis preserved across translations.
